jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Jaypee Hospital
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Jaypee Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Radiologist to strengthen our Gwalior-based team.

About Jaypee Hospital:
Jaypee Hospital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jaypee Hospital!
